name: Build Android APK

# Builds an unsigned debug Capacitor APK that points at https://pulse.indefine.in.
# Triggers:
#   - every push to main (so the latest commit always has a downloadable APK)
#   - manual via the Actions tab → Run workflow
#
# Output:
#   - artifact `sab-tracker-debug-apk` (90-day retention)
#   - download → unzip → `app-debug.apk` → sideload to phones
#
# This is a debug build with the auto-generated debug keystore. Not signed
# for Play Store. See MOBILE.md for sideload instructions; signing for
# release is documented as future work in the plan file.

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    # Only re-build the APK when something the APK actually depends on changes.
    # Web-app-only changes are picked up at runtime by the WebView — no APK
    # rebuild needed.
    paths:
      - "capacitor.config.ts"
      - "android/**"
      - "dist-mobile/**"
      - "package.json"
      - "package-lock.json"
      - ".github/workflows/build-android-apk.yml"
  workflow_dispatch: {}

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Assemble debug APK
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 25

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node 20
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: "npm"

      - name: Install npm dependencies
        # `npm ci` is faster + reproducible vs `npm install`. Required for
        # the `@capacitor/cli` we'll invoke below.
        run: npm ci

      - name: Set up JDK 21
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: "temurin"
          java-version: "21"

      - name: Set up Android SDK + accept licenses
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
        with:
          # Match android/variables.gradle:
          #   compileSdkVersion = 36
          #   targetSdkVersion  = 34
          api-level: 36
          build-tools: "36.0.0"
          accept-android-sdk-licenses: true

      - name: Sync Capacitor → android/
        # Copies dist-mobile/ assets and capacitor.config.ts settings into
        # android/app/src/main/. No Next.js build needed because our webDir
        # is the static fallback — the actual app loads from server.url
        # at runtime.
        run: npx cap sync android

      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x android/gradlew

      - name: Gradle — assemble debug APK
        working-directory: android
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon --stacktrace

      - name: Confirm APK output
        run: |
          ls -la android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/
          test -f android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

      - name: Upload APK artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sab-tracker-debug-apk
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
          retention-days: 90
          if-no-files-found: error
